proposals.reason: New MDCG guidance clarifies UDI assignment responsibilities between manufacturers and distributors, directly affecting EUDAMED compliance workflows.

card.x: Clarifies manufacturer vs distributor responsibilities for UDI assignment in EUDAMED registration workflows.

proposals.reason: New technical specification extends ISO 14971 with ML-specific risk management requirements including algorithmic bias and data governance.

card.x: Complements ISO 14971 with guidance on risk management for ML-based medical devices, covering algorithmic bias, performance degradation, and training data governance.

proposals.reason: Implementing Regulation harmonizes NB evaluation requirements under MDR Annex VII, affecting technical documentation format and surveillance procedures.

card.x: Harmonizes conformity assessment requirements under MDR Annex VII including technical report formats and NB surveillance obligations. Effective 18 May 2026.

proposals.reason: Joint IMDRF/FDA/MHRA/Health Canada guidance harmonizes PCCP requirements for ML devices across three major jurisdictions, eliminating fragmentation.

card.t: IMDRF/FDA/MHRA/Health Canada: PCCP Guiding Principles for ML
card.x: International alignment on Predetermined Change Control Plans for ML devices: transparency, structured change management, continuous performance validation.

proposals.reason: FDIS launched 22 May 2026, confirms publication timeline and scope details including AI/ML process planning requirements.

card.x: Two Software Process Accuracy Levels (I, II) replace Classes A/B/C. Scope expanded to all health software. AI/ML process planning explicitly included. FDIS launched 22 May 2026.

proposals.reason: Revised classification guidance adds new edge-case examples and clarifications, requiring audit of existing classification decisions.

card.x: Revision adds clarifications and new edge-case examples for MDR device classification rules.

proposals.reason: Transition timeline from EC REP to EU REP symbol affects labeling and technical documentation across all device portfolios.

card.t: MDCG 2021-5 Annex: EC REP → EU REP Symbol Transition
card.x: Phased transition timeline for authorized representative symbol from EC REP to EU REP on device labeling and documentation.

proposals.reason: New exemptions for Class IIa/IIb implantable devices from certain SSCPs and clinical evaluation requirements, affecting documentation burden.

card.x: Clarified exemption conditions for Class IIa/IIb implantable devices from summary of safety/performance and clinical evaluation requirements.

proposals.reason: Team-NB harmonized interpretation of Article 61(10) on non-clinical data substitution provides structured justification framework.

card.x: Harmonized NB position on acceptability of non-clinical data in lieu of clinical investigations under MDR Article 61(10), includes assessment grid.
